name: seaweb
description: Agent-native search with a real booking rail: SF hotels, attractions, restaurants. Honest, provenance-labeled results; availability checks and venue-confirmed booking requests.

interface.longDescription: Search San Francisco hotels, attractions, and restaurants with honest, provenance-labeled results. Check availability and send booking requests the venue confirms.
defaultPrompt: Find a hotel near Union Square for next weekend
Book a table for 2 in the Mission on Friday at 19:00
What attractions are within walking distance of the Ferry Building?
